TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Nana_Akufo-Addo, title = Nana_Akufo-Addo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nana_Akufo-Addo} }

S.FORM: Nana Akufo-Addo I 1944 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Nana Akufo-Addo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ghana anini i ci Nana Akufo-Addo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: nana ako~u~ufo~u-a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æo~u i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i nana ako~u~ufo~u-a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æo~u, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *ƒßana anini i ¶i nana ako~u~ufo~u-a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æo~u, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Nana Akufo-Addo I 1944 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Nana Akufo-Addo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ghana anini i ci Nana Akufo-Addo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
